CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-16-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC. , A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN POPPY HUT, INC. , A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA THE POKE SHOP HUANG, WEN SHENG , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA THE POKE SHOP $6,198.31 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $115.60 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,598.91, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100054475)
